title: STONEBORN - Quark
body:
[Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) containers resources in [STONEBORN](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stoneborn) style

![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LNx8liVN/images/69c0eb5c28521e5f7ce90f23f985637e1fcd9bb8.png)

This resource-pack is part of the [STONEBORN - Legacy Support](https://modrinth.com/collection/njlR2Sor) collection
